sn33.51-54:1.1:
1
Atha kho vacchagotto paribbājako yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavatā saddhiṁ sammodi. Sammodanīyaṁ kathaṁ sāraṇīyaṁ vītisāretvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho vacchagotto paribbājako bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
sn33.51-54:2.1: “Rūpe kho, vaccha, appaccakkhakammā, rūpasamudaye appaccakkhakammā, rūpanirodhe appaccakkhakammā, rūpanirodhagāminiyā paṭipadāya appaccakkhakammā … pe ….
sn33.51-54:3.1: Sāvatthinidānaṁ. “Vedanāya kho, vaccha, appaccakkhakammā … pe … vedanānirodhagāminiyā paṭipadāya appaccakkhakammā … pe ….
sn33.51-54:4.1: Sāvatthinidānaṁ. “Saññāya kho, vaccha, appaccakkhakammā … pe … saññānirodhagāminiyā paṭipadāya appaccakkhakammā … pe ….
